title: How Vector Search Works
subtitle: RAG & Vector Search — Like One Academy

sections.text: Discover the Magic of Vector Search
sections.subtext: Revolutionizing how data is found and used

sections.text: Did you know that vector search allows computers to find information based on similarity rather than keywords? It's like finding a song by its vibe instead of its name. How does this magical process work?

Vector search uses mathematical models to represent data points in multi-dimensional space. Each point is a vector, and its position tells us about its characteristics. The magic happens when we measure distances between these points.

By calculating the distance between vectors, we can determine how similar they are. This is like finding the nearest coffee shop based on your current location. The closest vectors represent the most similar data points.

From helping you find the perfect movie to understanding complex language patterns, vector search is transforming how we interact with data. It's all about making connections in a world of information.

sections.quote: The greatest enemy of knowledge is not ignorance, it is the illusion of knowledge.
